params.name: Kani Jade
params.description:
On Feb 7, 600 BC, the Three Treasures were bestowed on the emperor, including Kani Jade.
Amaterasu, the Sun Goddess, passed down the Kani Jade to Emperor Jinmu, who in turn entrusted it to his sister, Yamatohime. Years later, Crown Prince Takehiro was dispatched to subdue the eastern lands during a period of imperial crisis. Yamatohime gifted him the Kusanagi sword and the Jade for protection. At this juncture, the emperor passed away, and a power-hungry uncle seized control of the court, plo …
